mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, u.status, u.login_type, u.user_type, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.create_time, u.update_time, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.role_code ORDER BY r.role_code SEPARATOR ',') AS roles FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur2 JOIN sys_role r2 ON ur2.role_id = r2.id WHERE ur2.user_id = u.id AND r2.role_code = #{role} )
GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
